The median factor is 1.398.

Converting 20.56:
20.56 * 1.398:
20.56 * 0.008 = 0.16448
20.56 * 0.090 = 1.85040
20.56 * 0.300 = 6.16800
20.56 * 1.000 = 20.56000
0.16448 + 1.85040 = 2.01488
2.01488 + 6.16800 = 8.18288
8.18288 + 20.56000 = 28.74288
= 28.742

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{28.742}
